sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_series_data (value UInt8, time DateTime);
INSERT INTO time_series_data VALUES (1, now()), (0, now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR), (1, now() - INTERVAL 2 HOURS);
SELECT time, value, exponentialTimeDecayedCount(6)(time) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS exp_decay FROM time_series_data ORDER BY time;
UPDATE time_series_data SET value = 1 WHERE time < now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
SELECT time, value, round(exponentialTimeDecayedCount(5)(time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS exp_smooth FROM time_series_data;
